post.content:
You are trying to detect if two given documents are similar. You need to build a function that when given two sentences as strings indicates whether the two sentences are similar. You’re given an array of string pairs where each pair of words indicate that the two words are similar.

Your function should return\xA0true\xA0if\xA0sentence1\xA0and\xA0sentence2\xA0are similar, or\xA0false\xA0if they are not similar.
Two sentences are similar if:
* They have\xA0the same length\xA0(i.e., the same number of words)
* Corresponding words\xA0are similar.
Notice that a word is always similar to itself, also notice that the similarity relation is transitive. For example, if the words\xA0a\xA0and\xA0b\xA0are similar, and the words\xA0b\xA0and\xA0c\xA0are similar, then\xA0a\xA0and\xA0c\xA0are\xA0similar.
